property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. Raise card user's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +1 stage of damage if successful. Raise card users anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +1 stage of damage if successful. Raise card users anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. Raise card user's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +3 stages of damage if successful. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. Raise card user's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +3 stages of damage if successful. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +3 stages of damage if successful. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +3 stages of damage if successful. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. Raise card user's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +4 stages of damage. If successful, this attack stops any energy attack from an opponent in his next phase. Lower foe's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +2 stages of damage if successful. Stops a foe's physical attack on their next round. Lower foe's anger level by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +5 stages of damage if successful or stops an energy attack. Lower foe's anger level by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +1 stage of damage if successful. Raises your anger level by 1 and lowers foe's anger level by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Instantly power up to full and draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: All foes have their power rating changed to 2 stages higher than 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Physical attack, plus it stops a single named foe from making a physical attack on his next phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Physical attack, plus it stops a single named foe from making an energy attack on his next phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Physical attack doing +3 stages of physical damage if successful.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Physical attack, plus it stops a single named foe from making a physical attack on his next phase. It costs 2 power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Powers up 5 stages for a personality, going no higher than their maximum stage. Take the top discarded card and place it at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Increase your anger level by 2. Take the bottom 2 cards from your discard pile and place them at the bottom of your life deck. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, draw the bottom card from your discard pile. If used by Goku, it stays in play to be used one more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use. Limit 2 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack, Raise your anger 1. Gain 5 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 life cards draws if successful.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Stops all physical attacks performed against you for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 2 draws from the life deck if not stopped. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped physical attack performed against you this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped energy attack performed against you this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Remove someone else's drill card or ally from the game. Discard this card from the game after use.

card.name: It's the Little Things That Matter

property.name: Text
property.value: Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped energy or physical attack performed against you this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack forcing the defender to lose 1 life card and the attacker 3 stages of power. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack forcing the defender to lose 3 life cards and the attacker 3 stages of power. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Defensive move preventing up to 3 energy life cards from being discarded and draining the user 4 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack forcing the defender to lose 2 life cards and the attacker 4 stages of power. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 life card of damage. You must pass in all remaining phases of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use immediately after your opponent attacks you (this can be a physical or energy attack) and pays any costs for that attack. Lower your opponent's Main Personality 4 power stages immediately when played.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack, but you have to discard another card to use this one.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack but you have to discard another card to use this one.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack, but the user cannot make any attacks for the rest of this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: When you place this card in play, immediately raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 life card of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Skip your next Combat step. Place the top 2 cards from your discard pile on the bottom of your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing double the base damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops any physical attack but costs 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use after you perform a successful physical attack to capture an opponent's Dragon Ball. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the foes' physical attack played this round. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an opponent's physical attack this round. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +2 stages of damage if successful. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an opponent's energy attack. Foe's anger level decreases by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops opponent's physical attack this round. Foe's anger level decreases by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the foe's physical attack. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +1 stage of damage if successful. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stop foe's energy attack this round.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +3 stages of damage if successful. Foe's Anger level decreases by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +3 stages of damage if successful. Stops all energy attacks for the rest of this combat. Foe's anger level decreases by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the foe's physical attack. Lower foe's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Lower foe's anger level by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Lower foe's anger level by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Lower foe's anger level by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Lowers foe's anger level by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If successful, your opponent loses 3 power stages, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack doing 4 life card draws of damage or stopping any energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a foe's physical attack. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack doing 5 life card draws in damage and costing 4 stages to perform. Raise card user's anger level 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a foe's physical attack. Raise card user's anger level 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack doing 5 life card draws of damage or stops a physical attack. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack doing 6 life card draws of damage and costing 5 power stages to perform. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a foe's energy attack. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a foe's energy attack. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack. Raise card user's anger level 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw three cards if you wish, and place the top discarded card at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your anger 2 levels. The first combat your opponent declares while you control Earth Dragon Ball 4 is skipped. (They do not rejuvenate).

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise any one of your personalities to his highest power stage. Raise your anger 2 levels. Draw 2 cards. Place the top 2 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. The top 3 discarded cards are placed at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Choose 2 cards from your discard pile and place them on the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains and Goku only. Choose 2 cards from your discard pile and place them on the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Armor prevents 1 life card discarded from any successful energy attack that would have normally forced 1 or more discards. Limit one per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Multiform allows for two physical attacks one after another or a defense against a physical attack preventing 4 power stages of successful damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Solar Flare Energy Attack. If successful your opponent Skips their next attacker's attack's phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Solar Flare Energy Attack. If successful your opponent Skips their next attacker's attack's phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a Physical attack performed against Gohan or Goku. Chi-Chi can use this power even if your Main Personality is at 2 power stages above 0 or higher.

property.name: Text
property.value: Scientific Defense . Reduces the damage done by an energy attack by 2 life card draws.

property.name: Text
property.value: The uniform prevents 1 life card discard from any successful physical attack that would have normally forced 1 or more discards. Limit one per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. 2 discards of the user's choice are placed at the bottom of your life deck. Discard from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Creates an energy attack doing 7 life card draws at a cost of 4 stages of power drain. Discard from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Stops an energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Creates an energy attack inflicting 6 life card draws.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Energy attack. Costs 3 power stages to perform. If successful, your opponent cannot perform a physical attack during his next Attacker Attacks phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Stops an energy attack and stops an energy attack during your opponent's next Attacker Attacks phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Stops a physical attack and stops a physical attack during your opponent's next Attacker Attacks phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Powers up 6 stages for a personality, going no higher than maximum stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Powers up to the personality's highest stage. Select 2 discarded cards and place them at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Increase your anger level by 2. Take the top 2 cards from your discard pile and place them at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stop one physical or energy attack from doing damage. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat as the defender. Instead of drawing 3 cards from your life deck, draw the bottom 3 cards from your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat as the defender. Instead of drawing 3 cards from your life deck, draw the bottom 3 cards from your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat as the defender. Instead of drawing 3 cards from your life deck, draw the bottom 3 cards from your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Power Blast Energy Attack costs 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Blast Energy Attack does 6 life cards of damage and removes Chiaotzu from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack needs 3 power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Prevents 3 life cards from being discarded from a successful energy attack. If used by Goku, it stays on the table to be used one more time this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Does 6 life card draws of damage and costs 5 stages of power drain to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Gain 4 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Play this card as a defense. If your opponent's attack does life cards of damage to you, you may take the first life card of damage from that attack and place it in your hand instead of discarding it. If used by Krillin, this card stays in play to be used on more time this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 2 draws from the life card deck if not stopped. If used by Krilling, this card stays on the table to be used one more time in this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 2 life card draws of damage, costs 3 power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Prevents 3 life cards from being taken in a successful physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Forces a Hero opponent in this combat to discard 1 life card from his deck. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Forces a Hero opponent in this combat to take his anger level down 2. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Use when needed. This must be your first card played during Combat. Raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Stops all energy attacks performed against you for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Stop all physical attacks performed against you for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack forcing 1 draw from the life deck if not stopped. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack forcing 3 draws from the life deck. Remove from the game after use. Card limited to 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: All physical attacks performed against you, do 2 less power stages of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your physical attacks do +1 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, in place of an attack, during your turn, discard all of your opponent's Drills. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, you may draw a card after performing a successful attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the attacker, you may draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may gain up to 3 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: All energy attacks performed against you, do 1 less life card of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your physical attacks do +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: All energy attacks performed against you, do 1 less life card of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Do the exact same physical attack you defended against during your defending round of combat once per combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the first physical attack made on you in a combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the first energy attack made on you in a combat. Can't be used with any other Orange drills in play anywhere on the table.

property.name: Text
property.value: After receiving damage from an energy attack, you may draw the bottom card of your discard pile. Cannot be used with any other Black Drills in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: After taking damage from a physical attack, you may draw the bottom card of your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: For every life card you lose in combat, your foe loses 1 power stage, down to 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: For every 3 power stages you lose your opponent loses 1 power stage, down to 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, you may take 1 less life card of damage from any attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, if your opponent has an Ally in play, you may take 1 less life card of damage from any physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: All energy attacks performed against you, do 1 less life card of damage, to a minimum of 0. Cannot be used with other Orange Drills in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: All physical attacks performed against you, do 1 less power stage of damage, to a minimum of 0. Cannot be used with other Black Drills in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: All physical attacks performed against you do 2 less power stages of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your energy attacks that cost 2 power stages to perform, now only cost 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your physical attacks do +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your energy attacks do +1 life cards of damage. Cannot be used with other Red Drills in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, you may shuffle your Life Deck or discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your physical attacks do +3 power stages of damage. Cannot be used with any other Blue Drills in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your physical attacks do +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: All energy attacks performed against you, do 1 less life card of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy defense stopping a foe's physical attack. Discard from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stop this energy attack. Discard from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: All energy attacks performed against you, do 1 less life card of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops all of your opponent's physical and energy attacks for the remainder of Combat. Remove one of your Allies in play from the game to use this card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when needed. After you perform a successful energy attack, search your Life Deck for a Dragon Ball then place it in play and capture a Dragon Ball from your opponent. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Kamehameha Energy Attack does three life card draws and only costs one power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Kaio-Ken Power Level Booster. Physical attack draining 4 power stages no matter what Goku's power is. Do not consult table.

property.name: Text
property.value: Prevent 2 life card draws from being discarded from a successful energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Screw Blast Energy Attack inflicts 2 life card draws of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Special Energy Beam Cannon. This energy blast only takes 1 power stage to use and does 2 life card draws of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Multiform allows two physical attacks one after another, or a defense against a physical attack preventing 4 stages of successful damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: If a successful energy attack is performed against Gohan, you may raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 8 Power Stages of Damage. This attack must be the first attack you perform during combat and can only be used once per game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Kamehameha Energy Attack does 3 life card draws and only costs 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Power Ball Energy Attack inflicts 2 life card draws of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Destructo-Disk Energy Attack doing 3 life card draws of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Take 1 card from the discard pile and place it at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Energy Deflection: Reduce the damage from an energy attack performed against you to 2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Energy Blast does 3 life card draws of damage and costs only 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use the Saiyan Energy Blast (from Level 2 Character card) or Saiyan Energy Deflection (from Level 1 Character card).

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Energy Deflection: Reduce the damage from an energy attack performed against you to 2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Energy Blast does 3 life card draws of damage and costs only 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Captures one Dragon Ball once per game after a successful energy attack. This ends the combat step.

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Saiyan Energy Deflection: Reduce the damage from an energy attack performed against you to 2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Special Physical Attack inflicting 6 stages of power drain no matter what the foe's power stage rating is.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reduce the damage from a physical attack performed against you to 2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Do not consult the chart and do 4 stages of damage to the foe.

property.name: Text
property.value: When defending in combat, take the bottom discard card as well in your three card draw.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack. Costs 1 stage and does 3 life card draws of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw a card when entering Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, your Main Personality gains 2 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels. Once while you control Earth Dragon Ball 6, during your Attack Phase, you may end combat and raise your main personality to its highest power stage. (This power remains active until used.)

property.name: Text
property.value: During your Attackers Attack phase, you may play this card from your hand to end combat. Choose 3 cards in your discard pile and place them on top of your life deck. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, capture a Dragon Ball.

property.name: Text
property.value: Increase your anger level by 2. Select 2 cards from your discard pile and place them at the bottom of your Life Deck. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Increase the anger of a level 1 or 2 personality by 1 and discard this card from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Force another player to skip their combat step. Discard this from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: The spirit of the Earth heals you. Place 2 discarded cards at the bottom of your life deck. Discard from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: The efforts of your allies stop this combat. You must have an ally out on the table to use this card. Discard from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Use when entering Combat as the defender. Instead of drawing 3 cards from your life deck, draw the top 3 cards from your discard pile. If there are not enough cards in the discard pile, this card cannot be used. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat as the defender. Instead of drawing 3 cards from your life deck, draw the bottom 3 cards from your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Remove a Non-Combat Card or ally from in front of another player from the game. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Name a Non-Combat card and foes with any in their decks must discard them from the game. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: End Combat. Place the bottom card of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Set your opponent’s anger at 0. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Increase the personality's power stage to its maximum level. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for a Dragon Ball and place it into play. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops this combat. The turn ends, and the player may hold all his extra cards until his next turn. Discard from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw the top 2 cards from your discard pile. Your opponent's Main Personality gains 5 power stages. Remove from game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reduce the foe's power level by 4 stages, or to 0, whichever happens first. Discard this card from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: End Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: One ally gives your main personality power on a stage for stage basis, reducing their total and boosting your main personality's. Discard from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Place this on a foe's personality card. Reset the personality's anger to 0. It cannot go up until after he forces another player to discard a life card. Discard this from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your power level was miscounted. Raise it to full power. Discard this from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 times the base damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach this to your opponent's Main Personality. If Tien is in play, all villain opponents must play with their hands face up on the table.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a successful physical or energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use this card at the end of your Power Up step. Skip Combat this turn. At the beginning of your next turn, search your Life Deck and/or discard pile for your highest level Saibaimen card and place it into play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: If Gohan is Goku's ally, he stops the foe's combat turn. Discard after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Does an extra life card of damage with each successful attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 4 life cards of damage at a cost of 1 stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 0 power stages to perform. You must remove an Ally in play from the game in order to perform this attack. This does not have to be an Ally you control.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck or discard pile for an Ally and put him into play at his highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 2 draws from the life deck if not stopped and costing no power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Prevents all but 1 life card draw from a successful energy attack. Discard from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the beginning of each combat, draw 1 card from the bottom of the discard pile to use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: When the Bulma ally is in play, use this card to capture a Dragon Ball. Discard from the game after use. This card is not treated as a Dragon Ball.

property.name: Text
property.value: When the Bulma ally is in play, pick a drill from the life deck or the discards and put it into play. This card is not treated as a Drill.

property.name: Text
property.value: Forces every Villain opponent to constantly show his hand of cards face up at all times.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when needed. Your opponent discards 3 cards from his Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Defense Shield: When defending in Combat, stop the first unstopped attack performed on you. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when you perform an energy attack to have that energy attack do an additional +1 life cards of damage. (If a successful energy attack is performed against you while this card in play, this card is discarded.)

property.name: Text
property.value: Get a Dragon Ball card from the life deck and put it into play. Remove from the game after one use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent discards one life card for every Ally you have in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: All physical attacks performed against you, do 1 less power stage of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Allows multiple colors of drills to be used at the same time.

property.name: Text
property.value: Drill does an extra life card of damage whenever successful damage is done.

property.name: Text
property.value: Drill prevents 1 life card of damage from being taken whenever a successful attack happens on the card owner.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your Drills in play except for "Orange Focusing Drill" cannot be discarded or removed from the game unless you advance or lose a Personality level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Allows the card owner to take 2 less stages of power drain from a successful physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your physical attacks do +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Dragon Balls you control may not be captured while this Drill is in play

property.name: Text
property.value: Use at the end of any turn. If your opponent's Main Personality is at Level 3, lower his Main Personality one personality level. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use at the end of any turn. If your opponent's Main Personality is at Level 2, lower his Main Personality one personality level. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reveal cards from your opponents life deck until they reveal a Dragon Ball and set it aside. Shuffle your opponent's life deck. Then, if you revealed a Dragon Ball this way, place it on the bottom of its owners life deck. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Capture 2 of a foe's Dragon Balls and place them at the bottom of his life deck. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: This battle never happened. Start all over with new cards and reset all damage to beginning levels. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reduce the damage from an energy attack performed against you to 2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reduce the damage from an energy attack performed against you to 2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reduce the damage from an energy attack performed against you to 2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: If there is more than one Saibaimen in play, this one can make a physical attack that inflicts 5 life cards damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a successful energy or physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage for no power cost.

property.name: Text
property.value: Place the top 3 discard cards at the bottom of the life card deck. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops all heroes from losing 1 life card of damage from every attack for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Spirit bomb energy attack, costs 1 stage to do.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use Special Beam Cannon or Multi-Form in a combat round.

property.name: Text
property.value: Vegeta's laugh reduces a foe's power rating by 3 or to 0, which ever happens first.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Throat Strike does five stages of physical damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draws an extra card from the bottom of the discard pile for this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draws the bottom two cards from the discard pile to use in this combat.
